security_overview.purpose: Define security architecture for ULX IDE and AAIS service orchestration with constitutional governance
security_overview.security_model: Defense in depth with constitutional governance
security_overview.threat_model: Local-first deployment with constitutional compliance requirements
security_principles: Constitutional governance takes precedence over convenience
All security decisions are auditable and traceable
Fail-closed by default for constitutional violations
Defense in depth across all layers

measures.implementation: All services bind to 127.0.0.1, firewall rules restrict external access
measures.constitutional_implication: Reduces attack surface, aligns with local-first doctrine

measures.implementation: Services communicate via dedicated Docker bridge network
measures.constitutional_implication: Network segmentation for constitutional boundary enforcement

measures.implementation: Mutual TLS between API Gateway and AAIS service
measures.constitutional_implication: Encrypted communication preserves constitutional data integrity

layer_2_authentication.scope: Identity verification for all system components

measures.implementation: JWT tokens with constitutional scope and expiration

measures.constitutional_implication: Service identity verification for constitutional audit trail

measures.implementation: Redis AUTH, ChromaDB API keys, database credentials
measures.constitutional_implication: Infrastructure access governed by constitutional rules

measures.implementation: CAT tokens contain constitutional scope claims
measures.constitutional_implication: Authority boundaries enforced at API boundary
Role boundaries enforced by CUOS Foundation Laws

layer_4_data_security.scope: Data protection at rest and in transit

measures.constitutional_implication: Protects constitutional evidence and audit trails

measures.implementation: Environment variables with file permissions, key rotation
measures.constitutional_implication: Key access governed by constitutional rules

measures.implementation: All security events logged with constitutional metadata
measures.constitutional_implication: Security events part of constitutional audit trail

measures.implementation: Constitutional metrics and security metrics monitoring

security_standards: Conformance evidence requirements for security operations
ucdd_security_requirements.implementation: All security operations generate UCDD conformance evidence

cuos_security_requirements.implementation: All security operations comply with CUOS Foundation Laws

reconciliation_security.cross_system_security: Security operations coordinated across constitutional frameworks
reconciliation_security.violation_coordination: Security violations handled with cross-system escalation
reconciliation_security.evidence_synchronization: Security evidence synchronized between UCDD and CUOS audit trails

identified_threats.mitigation: CAT token validation, scope enforcement, audit logging
Evidence encryption, integrity verification, audit trail

api_gateway_security.authentication_middleware: CAT token validation with signature verification
api_gateway_security.rate_limiting: Constitutional rate limits to prevent abuse

constitutional_data.protection: Encryption at rest and in transit, strict access controls

governance_data.protection: Encryption at rest and in transit, access controls

incident_categories.response: Immediate escalation to constitutional authorities, system lockdown
Immediate containment, forensic analysis, constitutional impact assessment
Service isolation, recovery from backup, constitutional audit trail verification
Data restoration, integrity verification, constitutional evidence validation
Performance analysis, service scaling, constitutional impact assessment

response_procedures.recovery: Service restoration, data recovery, constitutional audit trail verification

compliance_and_governance.ucdd_compliance: All security operations comply with UCDD Standards Bundle
compliance_and_governance.cuos_compliance: All security operations comply with CUOS Foundation Laws
compliance_and_governance.cross_system_compliance: Security operations coordinated via reconciliation protocol
compliance_and_governance.audit_requirements: All security events logged with constitutional metadata

security_testing.penetration_testing: Regular penetration testing with constitutional constraints
security_testing.constitutional_testing: Constitutional compliance testing of security controls
security_testing.incident_response_testing: Regular incident response drills with constitutional scenarios

key_types.storage: Hardware security module or encrypted storage

key_management.key_access: Principle of least privilege, audit logging for all key access

next_steps: Conduct security testing with constitutional constraints
